untranslatable_reason: The signal requires dynamic profit target calculation based on measured price height from support levels. This requires: (1) identification of specific support level (not available as fixed indicator), (2) calculation of the height of the prior move (close - support_level), and (3) projection of that height downward from breakout point (support_level - height). The allowed indicators do not support dynamic multi-step calculations or user-defined support level storage. Pivot point s1 is used as a proxy for support level, but the core height-projection mechanism cannot be expressed with available operators.
translation_notes: Entry condition simplified to: price breaks below pivot support (s1). Exit condition set to: price closes back above support (reversal logic per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance). The sophisticated height-measurement and projection-downward methodology from the original signal cannot be encoded in this rule structure. A custom backtest module would be needed to properly implement the target-projection algorithm.
